assignments.title: ABC288F Integer Division
assignments.reason: 线性DP：数字串分割成若干整数，所有分割方式的乘积之和 mod，DP递推

assignments.title: ABC288G 3^N Minesweeper
assignments.reason: CDQ分治：三进制坐标邻居炸弹问题，分维度逐步分治解出炸弹布置

assignments.title: ABC289A flip
assignments.reason: 字符串遍历：将二进制串中 '0' 与 '1' 互换，逐字符处理

assignments.title: ABC289B レ
assignments.reason: 连通块涂色：建无向图找连通分量，各分量内按降序读取元素

assignments.title: ABC289C Coverage
assignments.reason: 状压DP：M ≤18，枚举 2^M-1 种选集方式，统计覆盖 1~N 的方案数

assignments.title: 爬楼机器人
assignments.reason: 线性DP/BFS：dp[i]=能否安全到达台阶 i，过陷阱台阶则截断

assignments.title: ABC289E Swap Places
assignments.reason: Dijkstra：双人同步移动图 (u,v,parity)，BFS求最少步数

assignments.title: ABC289F Teleporter Takahashi
assignments.reason: BFS应用：平面点对称传送，BFS穷举有限步内可达坐标集合

assignments.title: ABC289G Shopping in AtCoder store
assignments.reason: 斜率优化DP：对每件商品按最优定价函数，CHT凸包优化 O(N log N)

assignments.title: ABC290A Contest Result
assignments.reason: 数组遍历求和：按给定 B 数组下标访问 A 数组并累加得分

assignments.title: ABC290B Qual B
assignments.reason: 循环应用统计：遍历字符串，计数 'o' 的前 K 个位置标记为晋级

assignments.title: ABC290C Max MEX
assignments.reason: 二分答案：二分目标 MEX 值 m，贪心验证能否用 K 步选出 0..m-1

assignments.title: ABC290D Marking
assignments.reason: 线段树+二分：维护未标记方格集合，每步跳 +D 并跳过已标记格

assignments.title: ABC290E Make it Palindrome
assignments.reason: 普通莫队：离线统计所有子数组的回文化代价之和

assignments.title: ABC290F Maximum Diameter
assignments.reason: 计数DP：按度序列构造树，枚举最大直径，组合数学计算方案

assignments.title: ABC290G Edge Elimination
assignments.reason: 质因数分解：完全K叉树连通分量大小 X 需能被 K 整除，分解计算切割数

assignments.title: ABC291B Trimmed Mean
assignments.reason: sort函数：排序5N个评分，取中间3N个求平均

assignments.title: ABC291C LRUD Instructions 2
assignments.reason: set/map：用 set 记录已访问坐标，判断是否重复到达同一点

assignments.title: ABC291D Flip Cards
assignments.reason: 线性DP：相邻卡片朝上面不同，dp[i]=翻/不翻第 i 张的合法方案数

assignments.title: ABC291E Find Permutation
assignments.reason: 拓扑排序BFS：有向图中唯一拓扑序即为排列 A，检测是否唯一

assignments.title: ABC291F Teleporter and Closed off
assignments.reason: BFS应用：预计算前缀/后缀最短路，跳过第 k 个城市的路径

assignments.title: ABC291G OR Sum
assignments.reason: 同向双指针：按位独立，滑动窗口统计移位 k 使各位 OR 和最大的 A 旋转

assignments.title: ABC292A CAPS LOCK
assignments.reason: 字符大小写转换：将全部小写字母转大写，toupper() 或 ASCII 差 32

assignments.title: ABC292B Yellow and Red Card
assignments.reason: 过程模拟：用数组记录每名球员黄牌数，判罚时更新并回答查询

assignments.title: ABC292C Four Variables
assignments.reason: 质因数/因子统计：预计算 1~N 的因子对数 d(k)，答案= sum d(s)*d(N-s)

assignments.title: ABC292D Unicyclic Components
assignments.reason: 连通块涂色：DFS判断每个连通分量顶点数是否等于边数（恰好含一环）

assignments.title: ABC292E Transitivity
assignments.reason: Tarjan SCC缩点：添加最少边使图满足传递闭包，SCC缩点后按拓扑层计算

assignments.title: ABC292F Regular Triangle Inside a Rectangle
assignments.reason: 浮点数二分：二分正三角形边长，验证是否可放入 A×B 矩形内

assignments.title: ABC292G Count Strictly Increasing Sequences
assignments.reason: 线性DP：问号替换后使 N 个字符串严格递增的方案数，相邻串间DP

assignments.title: ABC293A Swap Odd and Even
assignments.reason: 字符串遍历：交换每对相邻字符 S[2i-1] 与 S[2i]
